description_long: This is a brightly colored, rectangular packet of instant noodles, featuring a predominantly red and yellow design. The front of the package displays an appetizing image of cooked noodles garnished with vegetables and herbs, suggesting a savory meal inside. Cyrillic text is prominently printed across the top, indicating the product name and possibly flavor or preparation instructions. The packaging appears to be made of a glossy, flexible plastic material, tightly sealed to preserve freshness. The sides of the packet are slightly curved outward, typical of vacuum-sealed snack packaging. The overall appearance is vibrant and designed to attract attention on a store shelf or in a vending machine.
description: A vibrant, rectangular packet of instant noodles with red and yellow graphics, featuring an image of prepared noodles and Cyrillic text. The glossy plastic packaging is tightly sealed and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main product image of cooked noodles with vegetables and the prominent Cyrillic brand name at the top.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the thickness of the packet and the continuation of the red and yellow design, with the product image partially visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the reverse side of the packet, with some text and graphics visible but less detailed than the front.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the packet's thickness and the edge of the main product image.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular red and yellow logo is visible on the front lower left of the package, featuring Cyrillic text and a stylized bowl graphic.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front image shows noodles with vegetables and herbs, and Cyrillic text may indicate flavor, but no explicit flavor in English is visible.
